author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Star Atlas Technical Test 

Hey everyone!

The canceled Unreal Engine 5 Star Atlas technical test from last Saturday will now be this Saturday at 2PM ET.

As a reminder, we'll be introducing a brand new game mode called Surge. Surge is a faction vs. faction vs. faction 3rd person shooter combat game mode focused on bringing glory to your team by eliminating opposing factions and scoring points.    

As long as you have already redeemed a Star Atlas Epic Games Store key, you can help us test! Mark interested on the event below and we'll see you in the Volant Station! (Note: This technical test doesn't have rewards but the public test will)

 | https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/1222706463802265621
